_doc: Independent single-rater (Claude Opus, vision on canonical LibreOffice dpi=150 renders) classification of each sampled flip-run. verdict in {verse, prose, ambiguous}. 'verse' = authored as distinct lines (free-verse/litany/anaphora/list/scripture); 'prose' = sentences/exposition/dialogue merely set one-clause-per-line (a FALSE FOLD); 'ambiguous' = on the boundary (deliberately lineated layout carrying expository/exegetical content; defensible either way). false_fold := verdict=='prose'. Renders for the risk/boundary strata were read directly; clear-verse bulk in verse-dominant books was read by text with per-book render confirmation of representatives.
